name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Value Pawn & Jewelry is a Miami pawn shop offering collateral-based loans, gold buying, retail merchandise sales, and flexible payment options on pre-owned brand-name items.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry operates a physical pawn shop located at 736 NW 183rd Street in Miami, Florida. The business is part of the EZPAWN family of stores and serves the local community by providing quick cash solutions through pawn transactions and merchandise sales.

The company offers multiple financial and retail services: pawn loans (collateral-based loans), gold and diamond buying, auto loans, and firearm sales. On the retail side, they sell pre-owned brand-name merchandise at discounts of 25-70% off retail prices, including electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming equipment, musical gear, handbags, and sneakers. They also provide flexible purchase options including layaway (10% down with monthly payments) and third-party financing plans for up to 12 months depending on credit eligibility.

Value Pawn & Jewelry distinguishes itself through its EZ+ Rewards Program, which allows customers to earn EZ Points on pawn, redeem, sell, or purchase transactions and manage accounts online. The store offers an Instant Quote tool for electronics that provides estimated values in seconds. Additional services include an online shop with daily new arrivals, jewelry and product protection plans, and free jewelry cleaning for VIP members. Store hours are extended Monday-Friday (9am-7pm) and include weekend and Sunday hours.

For consumers seeking fast cash against collateral, this pawn shop provides a straightforward alternative to traditional lending. However, customers should understand that pawn loans involve surrendering physical items as collateral and are subject to fees and specific terms. The store's merchandise sales appeal to bargain hunters but carry the caveat that all items are pre-owned with no manufacturer affiliation or endorsement.
address: 196 N Powerline Rd, Pompano Beach, FL 33069

company_info.headquarters: 196 N Powerline Rd, Pompano Beach, FL 33069

pros: Extended store hours (9am-7pm weekdays, 9am-6pm Saturday, 12pm-5pm Sunday) for convenient access
Instant Quote tool for electronics that provides estimated value online within seconds
EZ+ Rewards Program awards points on pawn, redeem, sell, and purchase transactions with online account management
Multiple payment options including layaway (only 10% down) and third-party financing up to 12 months
Wide merchandise selection with 25-70% discounts off retail, receiving new items daily
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts, 100% trade-up values, and free cleaning/freestone replacement
Multiple quick cash options: pawn loans, gold/diamond buying, and retail merchandise sales
cons: Pawn loans require surrendering physical items as collateral with risk of forfeiture if not redeemed
Website explicitly states not all services available in all areas and online payments unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, Pennsylvania
All merchandise is pre-owned with no manufacturer endorsement or affiliation despite brand-name listings
Pawn transactions subject to unspecified fees and terms requiring in-store consultation for details
No APR, interest rate, or fee transparency provided on website—customers must visit in person for pricing
best_for: People needing immediate cash who have valuable items (electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming equipment) to pledge as collateral
Bargain shoppers seeking discounted pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25-70% off retail prices
Customers interested in gold or diamond selling without the hassle of finding individual buyers
Budget-conscious buyers who prefer layaway or extended payment plans over upfront full payment
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best for consumers who own valuable items and need immediate cash, or bargain hunters seeking heavily discounted pre-owned merchandise. The primary caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering collateral and involve unspecified fees, making this a short-term emergency option rather than affordable credit; customers should visit in person to understand all terms and costs before transacting.
services: Pawn loans (collateral-based loans on items in decent working condition)
Gold and diamond buying with precious metal testing for fair pricing
Retail merchandise sales (pre-owned brand-name electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming, musical gear, fashion)
Layaway with 10% down and monthly payments
Third-party financed purchases (up to 12 months depending on credit eligibility)
EZ+ Rewards Program with online account and payment management
Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation
Online shop with daily new arrivals
Jewelry VIP Protection Plan with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up benefits
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise
